criteria_verification.criterion_text: On timeout: terminate the subprocess and return
criteria_verification.evidence: _execute_subprocess catches asyncio.TimeoutError, calls proc.terminate() and escalates to proc.kill() after _KILL_GRACE_SECONDS, awaits communicate() to release the handle, and returns timed_out=True; parser maps that to status='timeout'. Boundary verified at 599/600/601 by TestTimeoutBoundary.
criteria_verification.notes: _execute_subprocess catches asyncio.TimeoutError, calls proc.terminate() and escalates to proc.kill() after _KILL_GRACE_SECONDS, awaits communicate() to release the handle, and returns timed_out=True; parser maps that to status='timeout'. Boundary verified at 599/600/601 by TestTimeoutBoundary.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: On cancellation (caller cancels the surrounding asyncio task):
criteria_verification.evidence: _execute_subprocess catches asyncio.CancelledError, terminates the process (proc.terminate(), proc.kill() escalation), awaits proc.wait(), then re-raises the CancelledError. run() also re-raises CancelledError instead of folding it into a failed result. Verified by TestCancellationPropagation.test_cancelled_error_in_seam_propagates.
criteria_verification.notes: _execute_subprocess catches asyncio.CancelledError, terminates the process (proc.terminate(), proc.kill() escalation), awaits proc.wait(), then re-raises the CancelledError. run() also re-raises CancelledError instead of folding it into a failed result. issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)
No seam tests detected for cross-boundary feature. Consider adding seam/contract/boundary tests to validate technology boundary interactions. This is a recommendation, not a blocking gate.

rationale: All quality gates passed. Independent verification confirmed. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 289 chars provided.
